lines.speaker: Fat Tony
lines.text: I'm cooking pizzas for the people in this camp.

lines.speaker: Fat Tony
lines.text: Not that these louts appreciate my gourmet cooking!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what is a gourmet chef doing cooking for bandits?

lines.speaker: Fat Tony
lines.text: Well I'm an outlaw. I was accused of giving the king food poisoning! The thought of it! I think he just drank too much wine that night.

lines.speaker: Fat Tony
lines.text: I had to flee the kingdom of Misthalin! The bandits give me refuge here as long as I cook for them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have some pizza too?

lines.speaker: Fat Tony
lines.text: Well this pizza is really meant to be for the bandits. I guess I could sell you some pizza bases though

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh if I have to pay I don't want any.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll leave you to it.

lines.speaker: Fat Tony
lines.text: Well I guess I can sell you some half made pizzas.
